title: I found a WordPress RCEs with GPT5.6 and $25
summary: The article describes using a custom GPT-based tool (referred to as GPT5.6) to discover a WordPress Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability, which exploit brokers would pay up to $500,000 for. The author spent $25 on API costs, demonstrating how AI can assist in vulnerability research and bug bounty hunting.
